entities.name: BARNYARD MILLET
entities.description: A nutritionally important crop probably originated in central Asia and spread to Europe and America

entities.name: CENTRAL ASIA
entities.description: The probable region of origin for barnyard millet

entities.name: EUROPE
entities.description: A region where barnyard millet spread from central Asia

entities.name: AMERICA
entities.description: A region where barnyard millet spread from central Asia

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: A factor causing extra constraints and drier conditions in many parts of the country

entities.name: SEVERE WEATHER PATTERNS
entities.description: Increasingly severe weather patterns resulting from climate change

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: A strategy involving the development of better barnyard millet cultivars

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in observable traits among barnyard millet germplasm

entities.name: STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of performance of barnyard millet accessions across different environments

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per plant, a key trait contributing to phenotypic diversity

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: A trait that contributes to the phenotypic diversity of barnyard millet

entities.name: D2 ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to reveal phenotypic diversity in barnyard millet

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL FACTORS
entities.description: Factors that play a major role in the stability performance of barnyard millet accessions
